'''sapadha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mkhare|mkhare]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-p-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mkhare|mkhare]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| sapadha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæpædhæth|sæpædhæth]] || [[word:sæpædhæj|sæpædhæj]] || [[word:sæpædhæsh|sæpædhæsh]] || [[word:sæpædhæ|sæpædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sapapadhath|sapapadhath]] || [[word:sapapadhaj|sapapadhaj]] || [[word:sapapadhash|sapapadhash]] || [[word:sapapadha|sapapadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sapadhath|sapadhath]] || [[word:sapadhaj|sapadhaj]] || [[word:sapadhash|sapadhash]] || [[word:sapadha|sapadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sapafdhath|sapafdhath]] || [[word:sapafdhaj|sapafdhaj]] || [[word:sapafdhash|sapafdhash]] || [[word:sapafdhaf|sapafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sapadhatha|sapadhatha]] || [[word:sapadhaja|sapadhaja]] || [[word:sapadhasha|sapadhasha]] || [[word:sapadhaka|sapadhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sapadhath|sapadhath]] || [[word:sapadhaj|sapadhaj]] || [[word:sapadhash|sapadhash]] || [[word:sapadha|sapadha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sapadhathal|sapadhathal]] || [[word:sapadhajal|sapadhajal]] || [[word:sapadhashal|sapadhashal]] || [[word:sapadhakal|sapadhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sapadhathatha|sapadhathatha]] || [[word:sapadhajaja|sapadhajaja]] || [[word:sapadhashasha|sapadhashasha]] || [[word:sapadhaka|sapadhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sapadhathan|sapadhathan]] || [[word:sapadhajan|sapadhajan]] || [[word:sapadhashan|sapadhashan]] || [[word:sapadhakan|sapadhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sapadhathaoro|sapadhathaoro]] || [[word:sapadhajaoro|sapadhajaoro]] || [[word:sapadhashaoro|sapadhashaoro]] || [[word:sapadhakaoro|sapadhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
